noise_and_randomization._comment: P43 2026-05-23: wrapper-level DR enabled. Stacks on top of TestSimTower._sample_episode_dynamics (which already randomizes tau/k_u/k_d/dead by +/-10%). These knobs add output gain/bias drift, input jitter, actuator first-order lag, MV dead-time jitter, and DV mean shift on the *outside* of the plant. Each value is a magnitude; the randomizer draws per-episode within +/- value. Disable by setting DREAMER_DOMAIN_RANDOMIZATION=0 or SIM_DOMAIN_RANDOMIZATION=0.
